steps.title: Identify what we need to calculate
steps.content: Isabel saved 10% of the 760 potatoes she harvested. We need to find 10% of 760.

steps.title: Calculate using the 10% shortcut
steps.content:
10% equals $\frac{1}{10}$, so we divide by 10 instead of multiplying by 0.10.

$$760 \div 10 = 76$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
